title: nicotiana tomentosa var. leguiana
intro: Nicotiana tomentosa var. leguiana, also known as Tree Tobacco, is a perennial plant belonging to the nightshade family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tree Tobacco include its potential to soothe coughs, relieve bronchitis symptoms, and act as a natural expectorant. Herbal preparations of Nicotiana tomentosa var. leguiana include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
